# ScanOrbit

> Agentless AWS infrastructure scanner. Discover orphaned resources, expiring SSL certificates, security misconfigurations, and GDPR residency violations. EU-hosted, read-only, GDPR compliant.

ScanOrbit is an open-source, self-hosted tool that scans AWS accounts without deploying agents. It provides infrastructure visibility, cost optimization insights, and security/compliance checks for DevOps engineers, CTOs, and cloud teams.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://scanorbit.cloud/): Product overview, features, and how it works
- [API Reference](https://scanorbit.cloud/api-reference): Public API documentation
- [Security](https://scanorbit.cloud/security): Security practices and compliance information
- [Privacy Policy](https://scanorbit.cloud/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://scanorbit.cloud/terms): Terms of service
- [Contact](https://scanorbit.cloud/contact): Contact information

## Blog

- [How to Onboard a New DevOps Engineer to an Existing AWS Account](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/how-to-onboard-devops-engineer-to-aws-account): Practical onboarding process for new DevOps engineers joining an AWS environment
- [How to Find Orphaned EBS Volumes in AWS](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/how-to-find-orphaned-ebs-volumes-in-aws): Three methods to find and clean up orphaned EBS volumes inflating your AWS bill
- [Why You Can't Get a Full AWS Resource Inventory from the Console](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/why-you-cant-get-full-aws-resource-inventory-from-console): Why building a complete AWS resource inventory is harder than it should be
- [AWS Account Audit Checklist for Solo Engineers](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/aws-account-audit-checklist-for-solo-engineers): Security, cost, IAM, and compliance checks you can run in under an hour
- [How to Find Unused AWS Resources and Cut Costs](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/how-to-find-unused-aws-resources-and-cut-costs): Find idle EC2 instances, orphaned volumes, unused IPs, and forgotten load balancers
- [AWS Multi-Account Visibility: What CTOs Need to Know](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/aws-multi-account-visibility-what-ctos-need-to-know): What breaks when visibility doesn't scale with your AWS account structure
- [How to Monitor Your AWS Architecture Without CloudWatch Dashboards](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/how-to-monitor-aws-architecture-without-cloudwatch-dashboards): Get an architecture-level view of your AWS account without per-service dashboards
- [Building an AWS Infrastructure Map: Tools and Approaches](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/building-aws-infrastructure-map-tools-and-approaches): Generating architecture diagrams from manual tools to automated discovery
- [AWS Cost Visibility for Small Teams](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/aws-cost-visibility-for-small-teams): How small teams can understand AWS costs without dedicated FinOps tooling
- [How to Find and Fix Open Security Groups in AWS](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/how-to-find-open-security-groups-aws): Detect open ports and 0.0.0.0/0 exposure using Console and CLI
- [AWS Compliance Checklist: SOC2 and CIS Benchmarks for Startups](https://scanorbit.cloud/blog/aws-compliance-checklist-soc2-cis-benchmarks-for-startups): Which CIS benchmarks matter and how to get compliant without a full security team
